title: avenula occidentalis
intro: Avenula occidentalis, also known as Western oatgrass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and heal wounds. The health benefits of Avenula occidentalis include its ability to support respiratory health, alleviate menstrual cramps, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema. Herbal preparations of Avenula occidentalis typically involve infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to make a tea, or using the plant in a tincture or salve form to apply topically to affected areas.
